nasb.text: The soul of the sluggard craves and gets nothing, But the soul of the diligent is made fat.

esv.text: The soul of the sluggard craves and gets nothing, while the soul of the diligent is richly supplied.

cnv.text: 懶惰人渴求，卻一無所得； 殷勤人必得豐裕。

ccb.text: 懒惰人空有幻想， 勤快人心想事成。

csbs.text: 懒惰人贪得无厌，但他的欲望一无所得； 殷勤人的欲求，却必得满足。
